verdictType: by-looking (multimodal player-POV, NOT a CV threshold)
summary: Hero shows exactly ONE rifle held in both hands, pointing where it fires (muzzle flash at the barrel tip) in aim-right and aim-up; the turret shows ONE gunmetal barrel on a weaponless dome. No phantom waist gun / second baked weapon on either entity. Confirmed on both the local serve and the deployed public URL.

renderPathHashesAtVerdict.note: The hero/turret weapon LOOK only changes if the render code (or its sprite assets) change. run-acceptance.mjs recomputes these and flags the by-looking verdict as POSSIBLY-STALE if they differ — a human must then re-look, so the recorded verdict can never silently mask a render regression.

reconfirmations.trigger: render.js changed d57dd3e8b69f126b -> ea2492a150756f2f (set-dressing commit) — staleness guard fired, forcing this re-look.
reconfirmations.note: Re-captured weapon frames on the render-drifted build and re-judged BY LOOKING: hero still shows ONE horizontal rifle in both hands (muzzle at the barrel tip) and the turret still shows ONE barrel on a weaponless dome. The set-dressing render change did NOT reintroduce the two-weapon defect and did NOT regress hero/turret rendering (a full-canvas capture confirmed the hero draws correctly at its px/py).

reconfirmations.trigger: render.js changed ea2492a150756f2f -> 7d45942375f317e1 — staleness guard fired again in the consolidated gate.
reconfirmations.note: Re-looked at the fresh hero-aim-right capture on this build: still ONE horizontal rifle held in both hands with the muzzle flash at the barrel tip. No waist gun. renderPathHashesAtVerdict updated to the confirmed build; stale flag cleared.
